title: LCX8 P2-T08 missing/no-op handler classification
scope: Review all existing FAIL rows plus unavailable/guarded/route candidates that can be mistaken for missing handlers; keep statuses explicit and avoid guessing operational behavior.

reviewed_rows.label: Lifecycle onboarding row
reviewed_rows.handler: people-lifecycle route renders PeopleWorkforceDirectory initialTab="onboarding"; onboarding rows do not carry employeeId, so row.employeeId && onSelectEmployee short-circuits; LifecycleBoard complete/close handlers are imported but not rendered on the route
evidence_refs: apps/web/src/people/PeopleHome.tsx:122-124 renders PeopleWorkforceDirectory initialTab="onboarding" for people-lifecycle instead of LifecycleBoard.
apps/web/src/people/lifecycle/LifecycleBoard.tsx:67-77 has complete/close handlers, but that component is not rendered by the active people-lifecycle route.

reviewed_rows.label: Matter record action strip disabled under denied/review

reviewed_rows.label: People directory denied/review state
reviewed_rows.handler: PeopleHome does not accept or forward liveCtx/ctx to LegalPeopleWorkspace; hrxApiClient uses fixed allow-style HRX runtime headers and cannot render ctx=denied/review People directory state from route params
evidence_refs: apps/web/src/people/PeopleHome.tsx:44-48 accepts labels/activeSection only and does not accept route ctx/liveCtx.
apps/web/src/people/PeopleHome.tsx:81-85 renders LegalPeopleWorkspace without passing ctx/liveCtx.
apps/web/src/people/legal/LegalPeopleWorkspace.tsx:92-123 fetches legal people data from local filters/refreshKey and has no denied/review route-state input.

reviewed_rows.label: Profile data unavailable state
reviewed_rows.handler: static live-data-empty profile panels

apps/web/src/components/EmailFilingView.jsx:5-21 renders provider-unavailable email filing state; this is an external integration blocker, not a missing click handler.

reviewed_rows.label: People header refresh on standalone HRX panels
reviewed_rows.handler: PageHeader onClick -> setRefreshKey(key + 1), but standalone HRX panels are rendered without refreshKey/onRefresh props, so active panel data does not re-fetch; only PeopleHome overview fetchHrxEmployees runs
evidence_refs: apps/web/src/people/PeopleHome.tsx:63-71 refresh button only increments PeopleHome refreshKey; standalone HRX panels do not receive refreshKey/onRefresh props.

status_policy.missing_handlers: FAIL when a visible action affordance has no handler, no consumed state, or no visible result after local state change.
status_policy.unavailable_states: BLOCKED when the UI explicitly communicates an unavailable integration/data/runtime boundary and does not expose a misleading action.
status_policy.guarded_states: GUARDED only for explicit denial/review/disabled guard behavior; missing guard-state rendering remains FAIL.
status_policy.route_navigation: UI_ONLY when route navigation works and lands on a non-operational unavailable surface without claiming runtime execution.

row_update_note: P2-T08 missing/no-op classification: source and prior DOM evidence reviewed; row remains FAIL/BLOCKED/GUARDED/UI_ONLY as classified, with no operational PASS inferred.

commands.command: JSON/CSV consistency check for ledger, inventory, CSV, and P2-T08 artifact
commands.summary: 324 ledger rows, 324 CSV rows, 47 reviewed candidate rows, 43 confirmed FAIL rows, 4 non-FAIL boundary rows, status counts unchanged, UNKNOWN 0.
No auto-detectable AI slop signals found.
